news.t: Goldman Sachs Asset Management Announces Changes to the Goldman Sachs ActiveBeta® World Low Vol Plus Equity ETF

holdings.infoBox: GSWO is an equity ETF with a total of 775 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.51%, Apple at 4.83%, Microsoft at 3.09%, Amazon.com at 2.57%, and Alphabet at 2.41%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs ActiveBeta World Equity ETF (GSWO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index that selects large- and mid-cap stocks in developed markets based on three factors: value, momentum, and quality. GSWO was launched on Mar 15, 2022 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: Goldman Sachs ActiveBeta World Equity Index

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Goldman Sachs Asset Management, L.P., the investment adviser for the Goldman Sachs ActiveBeta® World Low Vol Plus Equity ETF (the “Fund”), announced that the Fund's Board of...
